SOLANA MIXER

SECURE & PRIVATE SOLANA MIXING SERVICE PROVIDER

  • Enter your new SOLANA address here.
    Only SOLANA addresses are supported.
    Please check the accuracy of the entered address! The arrival time of your clean coins depends on the delay chosen at the start of the session.

  • Enter the amount of SOLANA you wish to mix.
    Remember that the service charges a random commission of 1% - 5%.
    We recommend setting a custom fee to avoid transaction-based analysis.

  • The mixing fee ranges from 1% to 5%
    (the higher the percentage - the better the anonymity).

  • The transfer delay determines how long it will take for payments to the specified addresses to begin. Generally, the greater the transfer delay, the more anonymous your coins become. For large transaction volumes, a delay of several hours is recommended.

    • Notice!

    The transaction size must not be less than 1 SOL and not bigger than 2000 SOL at once.

    After the mixing process, the SOL origin will be fully anonymous and untraceable.

    We do not collect any logs, data, browsing history, or visitor information.


    FAQ | CONTACT

    © Solana Mixer | 2025
